pages.text: Mom holds me close. Her hands move. I smile.
“Good morning,” Mom signs. Her hands dance in the air. I wave back.
Mom shows me “love”. She points to her heart. Then to me.
At breakfast, we sign “eat”. I tap my mouth with my hand. Mom claps, “Yes!”
When we play, Mom signs “ball”. I roll it to her. She laughs.
Mom signs “bird”. We watch the birds fly. I flap my arms too.
At story time, Mom signs each word. Her hands paint pictures in the air. I listen with my eyes.
When I feel sad. Mom signs “hug”. She wraps me in her arms.
Mom meets her I watch their Deaf friends. moving hands.
I learn to sign “friend”. I hold my hands together. Mom smiles proudly.
Before bed, Mom signs “I love you”. Her hands make a special shape. I copy her.
Mom talks with her hands. I love Mom’s hands. Mom and me. Forever.
